clinical_note: Legacy rule: binary high-risk if multiclass label ≥ 1. Groups orthopedic (e.g. HipOA ~28.5% fall prob.) with neurological (PD ~67.3%) pathology — clinically heterogeneous.

Neurological-only high risk (multiclass ≥ 2). Separates orthopedic from neurological tiers; closer to pathology-stratified fall-risk literature (Lord et al. 1993; Allen et al. 2013 for PD/CVA-specific risk).
